jobCode.description: Mandatory unique code/reference for the job.

wordCount.description: Number of words in the assignment.

rate.description: Rate per word or flat rate.

writerCost.description: SLA or direct cost paid to the writer.

editorCost.description: SLA or direct cost paid to the editor.

qcCost.description: SLA or direct cost paid to the quality checker.

revisionCount.description: The count of revisions for this job.

completedAt.description: The ISO 8601 string of when the job was completed.

useChecklist.description: Whether the job uses an optional checklist.

checklist.description: Array of checklist items containing id, text, and completed status.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns the job.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the job was created.

clientCode.description: Unique shorthand code utilized to link with jobs.

notes.description: Optional notes or details for the client.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns the client.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the client was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the client was updated.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: An invoice for billing client jobs.

jobCode.description: The job code associated with this invoice.

status.description: Current payment status of the invoice.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns the invoice.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice was updated.

companyName.description: Custom Company/Agency name shown on the invoice.

billingMethod.description: The pricing model used for auto-calculation.

quantity.description: Used with Quantity x Rate pricing mode.

rate.description: Used with Quantity x Rate pricing mode.

jobId.description: The exact ID of the job in Firestore linked to this invoice.

message.description: Explanatory full text of the alert.

read.description: Whether the notification is registered as read.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns the notification.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the notification was created.

type.description: Categorization key for notification type, e.g. job_due_24h, payment_overdue, new_job, checklist_incomplete.

referenceId.description: Associated document identifier, e.g. job id, invoice id.

referenceType.description: Resource identifier type, e.g. job, invoice.

TeamMember.title: TeamMember
TeamMember.description: Pool of freelance team members that can be assigned to jobs.

name.description: Full name of the team member.

role.description: Designated core skillset or role of the team member.

email.description: Main email contact of the team member.

phone.description: Phone number/WhatsApp of the team member.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns/created this team member contact.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this team member was created.

clientTemplate.description: The customizable template string for contacting the client.

writerTemplate.description: The customizable template string for contacting the writer.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns this template.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when this template configuration was updated.

jobId.description: Link to the targeted job ID.

jobCode.description: Shorthand tracking code of the job.

userId.description: UID of the owner who initiated the activity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this log was written.

AssignmentLog.title: AssignmentLog
AssignmentLog.description: Historic audit of assignments when a team member is assigned or changed.

jobId.description: ID of the associated job document.

jobCode.description: Shorthand tracking code of the job.

role.description: The specific assignment seat (Writer, Editor, or QC).

previousAssigneeName.description: Name of previous team member assigned (or 'None').

newAssigneeName.description: Name of new team member assigned (or 'None').

userId.description: UID of the workspace owner who performed this transaction.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the assignment change occurred.

JobActivity.title: JobActivity
JobActivity.description: An activity log entry for a specific job.

jobId.description: ID of the associated job document.

action.description: The action performed, e.g. Job Created, Writer Assigned.

userName.description: Display name of the user who performed the action.

userEmail.description: Email address of the user who performed the action.

userId.description: UID of the owner who initiated the activity.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this activity log entry occurred.

JobFile.title: JobFile
JobFile.description: A file uploaded to a job repository.

jobId.description: ID of the associated job document.

fileName.description: The original name of the file.

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes.

fileData.description: Base64 data URI of the file content for real-time preview and download.

uploadedBy.description: Full name or email of the person who uploaded the file.

userId.description: UID of the user who owns or uploaded this file.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded.

Revision.title: Revision
Revision.description: A contract revision record associated with a job.

jobId.description: ID of the associated job document.

revisionNumber.description: Shorthand tracking count of revision sequence.

requestedDate.description: ISO timestamp for when the revision request was lodged.

requestedBy.description: Name of the entity requesting the revision.

revisionNotes.description: Instructional notes or brief explaining the revision requirements.

completionDate.description: ISO timestamp for when the revision task was set completed.

userId.description: UID of the owner who initiated/recorded the revision request.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was logged.

team_members.description: Collection of available candidates for hire assignments.

whatsapp_templates.description: Collection of custom WhatsApp communication templates.

communications.description: Log records tracking WhatsApp messages sent to writers and clients.

revisions.description: Log records tracking job revisions requested by client/others.
